goal: Find the installation command for the Calendar component

actions.title: The Foundation for your Design System - shadcn/ui
actions.description: Click the 'Components' link to navigate to the components documentation
actions.reasoning: The installation command for the Calendar component is likely found within the components documentation. The 'Components' link (href=/docs/components) is not banned and will lead us to the list of components where we can locate Calendar and view its installation instructions.

actions.title: Components - shadcn/ui
actions.description: Click the Calendar link to navigate to the Calendar component page
actions.reasoning: The Calendar component link at index 31 points to /docs/components/radix/calendar, which should contain the installation command for the Calendar component.
